briefs.title: WorkSafeBC Compensation Dollar Amounts Adjusted Upward Effective January 1, 2025
briefs.summary: B.C. Reg. 272/2024 adjusts the statutory dollar amounts under the Workers Compensation Act, effective January 1, 2025, replacing the previous 2023 regulation.
briefs.action_required: Update payroll and workers' compensation calculations to reflect the new dollar amounts effective January 1, 2025.

key_dates.label: BC Workers Compensation Act adjusted dollar amounts take effect

briefs.industries: Labour & Employment, Construction & Development, Professional Services
